overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic riverbank during golden hour. The character travels from a sandy shore through grassy meadows and up a hillside, revealing a panoramic view of the river valley and distant settlement.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the sandy riverbank with swords on his back, moving toward the water's edge

entered.detail: light-colored sand along the water's edge where the character is walking
calm reflective water surface running parallel to the path
large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the background
sparse trees and bushes along the left side of the riverbank

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit sandy riverbank with a majestic snow-capped mountain looming in the distance. The scene is tranquil and empty, with scattered vegetation on the left and calm waters to the right, bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with wildflowers approaching hillside

events.description: ground surface transitions from sand to grassy meadow with tall vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through tall grass and wildflowers, approaching the rocky hillside

entered.detail: lush green grass replacing the sandy terrain, with scattered wildflowers
tall purple flowers dotting the grassy landscape
grass-covered rocky hill rising ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts from sand to a lush grassy meadow filled with purple wildflowers. Geralt continues walking toward a rocky hillside in the distance, with the river now further to the right and trees visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with panoramic river valley view

events.description: character begins ascending the grassy hillside, terrain becomes steeper and rockier
character reaches hilltop and pauses to survey the landscape, camera pans to show panoramic view

agents.ego_description: climbing up the grassy hillside, then stopping at the summit to look around at the river valley and distant village

entered.detail: exposed rocks and steeper grassy slopes on the hillside
settlement with buildings visible across the river valley
bridge structure spanning the river in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt climbs the rocky grassy hillside, reaching the summit around the 50-second mark. From the hilltop vantage point, he surveys a breathtaking panoramic view of the river valley, a distant village, and a stone bridge, with the snow-capped mountain now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a journey from a tranquil riverbank up to a high panoramic vantage point. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit sandy shore beside calm waters, with a majestic snow-capped mountain looming in the distance under warm golden hour light. As he moves forward, the terrain shifts from sand into a lush grassy meadow filled with purple wildflowers, pushing the river further to the right as the path leads toward a rocky hillside. The scene then ascends the grassy slope, climbing steadily until it reaches the summit. Finally, the camera opens up to a breathtaking panoramic view of the river valley, revealing a distant village and a stone bridge with the snow-capped mountain now positioned to the left.
